channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 17, 2026
item.description:
1. Multi Commodity Exchange of India (MCX): The stock of this capital markets company scaled a fresh 52-week high of Rs 2,903 on April 16, powered by a broad surge across commodity markets. Between th...

item.title: Market closes higher on US-Iran peace deal hopes and foreign fund inflows
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 24,353.55 (156.8, 0.7%), BSE Sensex closed at 78,493.54 (504.9, 0.7%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,869.40 (213.1, 0.9%). Market breadth is overwhelmingly positive. Of th...

Premium: No

item.title: Standing up to global shocks: Stocks leading revenue & earnings growth estimates
item.description:
The Indian markets are reeling from record FII outflows of Rs 1.6 lakh crore in FY26. Domestic investors have stepped in with strong inflows, cushioning the impact and keeping the indices from slippin...

Premium: No

item.title: Market closes lower, dragged by profit booking and selling pressure in auto & FMCG stocks
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 24,196.75 (-34.6, -0.1%), BSE Sensex closed at 77,988.68 (-122.6, -0.2%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,656.30 (60.8, 0.3%). Market breadth is in the green. Of the 2,770 s...

Premium: No

item.title: After fast fashion, 'fast war' is here with low-cost weapons. And Indian defence players are delivering
item.description:
World War 1 was won by tanks. World War 2 was won by planes, that bombed slow-moving tanks from the air. War has made a comeback since 2022, with Ukraine, Iran and Lebanon emerging as battlegrounds. B...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - April 14, 2026
item.description:
1. Power Finance Corp (PFC): ICICI Direct initiates coverage on this financial company with a ‘Buy’ rating, with a target price of Rs 520 per share, an upside of 19.9%. Analysts Vishal Narnolia and P...

item.title: IPO market defies volatility with 3 positive listings last week, and 4 more lined up
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed lower today, April 13, after last week’s gain of 5.9%, the largest since February 2021. The on-again, off-again hostilities between the US and Iran have turned the market into a yo...

Premium: No

item.title: Dividend yields vary across sectors, but Indian IT comes out on top
item.description:
Stock market investors look for returns in two ways: betting on stock prices going up, or through dividends, where companies share a part of their profits. This is where dividend yield comes in. It te...

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 10, 2026
item.description:
1. Titan: This gems & jewellery company rose 10% in the past week as its revenue jumped 46% YoY in Q4FY26. Growth remains broad-based, with both domestic and jewellery businesses up over 40%. Consumer...

item.title: After the drop, are stock market valuations finally reasonable?
item.description:
The Nifty 50 opened sharply higher on Wednesday, jumping over 3% after the US and Iran agreed to a two week ceasefire, with Iran agreeing to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The ceasefire is already fragi...
